metadata.reference: M. A. El-Sayed, G. A. Ermolaev, K. V. Voronin, R. I. Romanov, G. I. Tselikov, D. I. Yakubovsky, N. V. Doroshina, A. B. Nemtsov, V. R. Solovey, A. A. Voronov, S. M. Novikov, A. A. Vyshnevyy, A. M. Markeev, A. V. Arsenin, V. S. Volkov. Optical constants of chemical vapor deposited graphene for photonic applications, Nanomaterials, 11, 1230 (2021) (Numerical data kindly provided by Georgy Ermolaev)
metadata.comments: Broadband optical constants of CVD graphene in the spectral range 240–1000 nm.
